description: Spring Cloud Gateway route definitions — single entry point routing requests to downstream microservices by path.
lb:// URI scheme activates Spring Cloud LoadBalancer — resolves service name to actual instance via Eureka.

codeSnippet:
.route("inventory-service") { r ->
    r.path("/api/inventories/**")
        .filters { f ->
            f.filter(authFilter.apply(...))
                .requestRateLimiter { config ->
                    config.setRateLimiter(redisRateLimiter)
                    config.setKeyResolver(userKeyResolver)
                    config.setDenyEmptyKey(false)
                }
        }
        .uri("lb://inventory-service")
}
description: Redis token-bucket rate limiter applied selectively to inventory service to protect against Flash Sale traffic spikes.

codeSnippet:
/**
 * Redis Token Bucket Rate Limiter.
 * replenishRate: 100 tokens/sec
 * burstCapacity: 200 tokens (allows short bursts)
 * requestedTokens: 1 token per request
 */
@Bean
fun redisRateLimiter(): RedisRateLimiter =
    RedisRateLimiter(100, 200, 1)
description: Token bucket implementation: 100 req/s steady-state with 200-token burst capacity configured via RedisRateLimiter.
JWT validation at gateway edge with Redis blacklist check — propagates user identity as downstream headers (X-User-Id, X-User-Roles).
Gateway resolves lb://service-name via Eureka service discovery — dynamic routing without hardcoded IP addresses.
Reads active experiment configuration from Redis cache at the gateway layer — avoids per-request DB lookup.
Reactive Mono chain in WebFlux gateway filter — non-blocking Redis check with flatMap continuation and error fallback.
SAM (Single Abstract Method) lambda implements KeyResolver functional interface — extracts rate limit key from exchange.
Extends AbstractGatewayFilterFactory to wrap JWT+Redis authentication logic as a reusable gateway filter — adapter to SCG filter API.
WebFlux security chain with CSRF disabled — gateway handles auth at filter level, not Spring Security's CSRF mechanism.
@Component + GlobalFilter + Ordered annotations register a highest-precedence cross-cutting logging filter automatically.
Implements GlobalFilter and Ordered interfaces — interface-based extension point for gateway filter chain behavior.

codeSnippet:
data class ActiveExperiment(
    val id: Long = 0,
    val variants: List<Pair<String, Int>> = emptyList()
)
description: Inner data class as Redis-deserialized DTO with default values — Kotlin data class simplifies JSON mapping at the filter layer.
